task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Possible Ransomware Attack' alert profile configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface is visible, showing the configuration or edit page specifically for the 'Possible Ransomware Attack' alert profile.

task_completion.description: Set the event threshold count to 50
task_completion.visual_evidence: The threshold setting for the number of events (e.g., 'Threshold', 'Events', or 'Occurrences') is explicitly set to the number 50.

task_completion.description: Set the threshold time window to 1 minute
task_completion.visual_evidence: The time window associated with the threshold is set to 1 minute (e.g., 'within 1 minute(s)').

task_completion.description: Enable email notifications and set the recipient address
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email notification option is enabled (checked/toggled on) and the 'To' or recipient email address field contains 'soc-alerts@acmefinancial.com'.
The email subject field contains exactly 'CRITICAL: Ransomware Activity Detected'.

task_completion.description: Save the configuration screenshot to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer or save dialog shows a screenshot named 'ransomware_config_evidence.png' being saved in 'C:\workspace\', or an image viewer displays this file showing the correct ADAudit Plus configuration.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a real web browser navigating the ADAudit Plus GUI, not a text editor, mockup, or terminal echoing the task description.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and used to modify the DOM text to fake the threshold or email settings.

integrity.description: Verify the evidence file is a genuine screenshot of the configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'ransomware_config_evidence.png' must be an actual image capture of the browser window showing the configured alert profile, not a renamed text file or an empty image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Alert Profile Name: 'Possible Ransomware Attack'. Expected Threshold: 50 events. Expected Time Window: 1 minute. Expected Email Recipient: 'soc-alerts@acmefinancial.com'. Expected Email Subject: 'CRITICAL: Ransomware Activity Detected'. Evidence File Path: 'C:\workspace\ransomware_config_evidence.png'.
